title: elymus alienus
side_effects: Elymus alienus can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, including hives and itching, and gastrointestinal issues like nausea and diarrhea. In severe cases, misuse of the plant may lead to more serious complications, such as respiratory failure or cardiac arrest. Some individuals may experience neurological side effects, including headaches, dizziness, and even seizures. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can also cause liver damage and kidney failure.
